info.title: Heify API
info.description: API for audio and video processing, transcription, and analysis.

post.description: Generates a secure, pre-signed S3 URL for uploading a local audio file. This is the first step in the two-step local file upload process. The URL is valid for 5 minutes.

200.description: Pre-signed URL generated successfully. Use the returned values to perform the PUT upload.

post.description: Submits an audio file for processing and transcription using a specified configuration. The audio can be provided either by uploading a file directly (`multipart/form-data`) or by pointing to a publicly accessible URL (`application/json`). Upon success, a transcription job is created and starts processing asynchronously.

requestBody.description: The audio source and transcription parameters.

201.description: Transcription job created successfully. The process has been initiated.

post.description: Creates a new, reusable configuration template that specifies settings for processing audio/video files.

extraction_fields.name: ticket_id
extraction_fields.description: The support ticket number mentioned in the conversation

extraction_fields.name: issue_resolved
extraction_fields.description: Whether the technical issue was resolved during the call

post.description: Retrieves either a single configuration by its ID or a list of all available configurations for the client.

requestBody.description: To retrieve a specific configuration, provide its `configuration_id`. To retrieve all configurations, send an empty JSON object: `{}`.

200.description: Successfully retrieved configuration(s). The response structure depends on whether a single configuration or all of them were requested.

post.description: Retrieves details for a specific transcription, or lists all transcriptions for the client.

GetSingleTranscription.summary: Request details for a single transcription

GetAllTranscriptions.summary: Request all transcriptions for the client

200.description: Successfully retrieved transcription details or a list of transcriptions.

SingleTranscriptionCompleted.summary: Example response for a single completed transcription

SingleTranscriptionInProgress.summary: Example response for a single in-progress transcription

AllTranscriptionsSuccess.summary: Example response for all client transcriptions

post.description: Updates the `group` classification for a specific transcription.

200.description: The transcription group was updated successfully. The full, updated transcription object is returned.

client_id.description: The client identifier associated with the configuration.

configuration_id.description: The unique identifier for the configuration.

tag.description: A descriptive name for the configuration.

vocabulary.description: An array of custom words or phrases.

created_at.description: The timestamp of when the configuration was created.

ConversationContent.description: The conversation transcript with speaker-separated segments.

ConversationSegment.description: A single segment of a conversation.

text.description: The transcribed text for this segment.

configuration_id.description: The unique identifier (UUID) for the created configuration.
The unique identifier of the configuration to be deleted.

transcription_id.description: The unique identifier of the transcription to be deleted.

DetailsEndpointResponse.title: DetailsEndpointResponse
DetailsEndpointResponse.description: Response can be either a single transcription's details or a list of all client transcriptions with statistics, depending on the request.

transcription_id.description: The unique identifier of the transcription to retrieve. If not provided, all transcriptions will be returned.

DetailsRequest.description: Request body for retrieving transcription details. Provide a `transcription_id` for a specific transcription, or an empty object `{}` to retrieve all transcriptions for the client.

description.description: A clear, detailed description to guide the AI on what to extract. For example, to classify sentiment, use: 'Classify the overall sentiment. Must be one of: POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, or NEUTRAL'.

ExtractedFieldItem.description: A single extracted field with its name and value.

name.description: The name of the extracted field.

value.description: The value of the extracted field. Its type depends on the configured extraction field type (string, number, boolean, array).

FieldsContent.description: The object containing extracted structured data.

total_configurations.description: The total number of configurations returned.

total_transcriptions.description: The total number of transcriptions found for the client.

GetAllTranscriptionsResponse.description: Response containing all transcriptions for a client along with statistics.

configuration_id.description: The unique identifier of the configuration to retrieve. Omit to retrieve all configurations.

GetSingleTranscriptionResponse.title: GetSingleTranscriptionResponse

oneOf.description: Full details for a completed transcription.

status.description: The current status of the transcription job.

configuration_id.description: ID of the configuration used for this transcription.

configuration_tag.description: Tag of the configuration used for this transcription.

details.description: Full transcription results, available only if status is COMPLETED.

oneOf.description: Full details for a failed transcription.

status.description: The current status of the transcription job.

details.description: Error information, available only if status is FAILED.

oneOf.description: Basic details for a transcription in other statuses (e.g., PENDING, IN_PROGRESS).

status.description: The current status of the transcription job.

configuration_id.description: ID of the configuration used for this transcription.

configuration_tag.description: Tag of the configuration used for this transcription.

GetSingleTranscriptionResponse.description: Response containing details for a single transcription, structure varies by status.

tag.description: A descriptive name for the configuration (e.g., "Sales Call Analysis").

vocabulary.description: An array of custom words, phrases, or proper nouns to improve recognition accuracy.

extraction_fields.description: A list of structured data fields for the AI to extract from the transcript. Maximum 10 fields. Field names are auto-normalized on creation: lowercased and special characters replaced with `_` (e.g. `"Customer ID"` → `"customer_id"`).

summary.description: If `true`, an AI summary of the transcription will be generated.

custom_summary.description: A custom prompt that guides how the AI generates the summary (e.g., `"Focus on customer complaints and resolution steps"`). Only takes effect when `summary` is `true`.

summary_language.description: Language for the generated summary. Use `"df"` for automatic detection based on the audio language. See [Supported Languages](/core/transcription#supported-languages).

analytics_language.description: Language for analytics reports. Use `"df"` for automatic detection. See [Supported Languages](/core/transcription#supported-languages).

configuration_id.description: The unique identifier of the configuration to be used for the transcription.

name.description: An optional, user-defined name for the transcription job.

upload_url.description: The pre-signed S3 URL to which the audio file should be sent via a PUT request.

transcription_id.description: The unique identifier generated for this transcription job.

configuration_id.description: The configuration ID that will be associated with the upload.

name.description: The name that will be associated with the upload. Will be null if not provided in the request.

SubmitFileRequest.description: Schema for submitting a transcription job by uploading an audio file.

file.description: The audio file to be transcribed.

configuration_id.description: The unique identifier of the configuration to use for processing.

name.description: An optional, user-defined name for the transcription job.

transcription_id.description: The unique identifier for the newly created transcription job. This is derived from the original file name.

SubmitUrlRequest.description: Schema for submitting a transcription job via a public URL.

source_url.description: A publicly accessible URL to the audio file.

configuration_id.description: The unique identifier of the configuration to use for processing.

name.description: An optional, user-defined name for the transcription job.

SummaryContent.description: The generated summary of the transcription.

summary.description: The text content of the summary.

TranscriptionErrorDetails.description: Contains details about why a transcription failed.

code.description: An error code corresponding to the message.

failed_at.description: The timestamp when the transcription failed.

summary.description: The generated summary object, if enabled.

fields.description: The extracted fields object, if configured.

TranscriptionFullSuccessDetails.description: Full details for a successfully completed transcription.

oneOf.description: Representation of a completed transcription in a list.

status.description: The current status of the transcription job.

configuration_id.description: ID of the configuration used for this transcription.

configuration_tag.description: Tag of the configuration used for this transcription.

details.description: Minimal transcription results for a completed job, suitable for listings.

oneOf.description: Representation of a failed transcription in a list.

status.description: The current status of the transcription job.

details.description: Error information for a failed job, suitable for listings.

oneOf.description: Representation of a transcription in other statuses (e.g., PENDING, IN_PROGRESS) in a list.

status.description: The current status of the transcription job.

configuration_id.description: ID of the configuration used for this transcription.

configuration_tag.description: Tag of the configuration used for this transcription.

TranscriptionMinimalSuccessDetails.description: Minimal details for a successfully completed transcription in a list context.

transcription_id.description: The unique identifier of the transcription to update.

group.description: The new group for the transcription. Valid values are 'PENDING_REVIEW', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'ARCHIVED'. To remove the transcription from a group, provide an empty string ("").

Webhooks.description: A set of URLs for receiving success or error notifications. Both URLs must be valid HTTPS URLs.

success_url.description: The URL to which a POST notification will be sent upon successful job completion.

error_url.description: The URL to which a POST notification will be sent if the job fails.
